title: BEM-859 route via Curator fix
objective: Correct BEM-859 protocol alignment routing. The operator clarified that internal auditor Claude must be contacted only through Curator, not directly. Required actions: 1) If governance/audit/mailbox/to_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_REQUEST.md exists, move it or replace it with an archived/superseded marker stating: SUPERSEDED - invalid direct route, use Curator route only. 2) Create directory governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator if missing, or use the existing curator mailbox/handoff path if the repository already has one. 3) Create governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_REQUEST_FOR_CURATOR.md. This file must ask Curator to route the protocol draft to internal auditor Claude and collect one of exactly three audit statuses: APPROVED, APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS, BLOCKED_WITH_REASON. 4) Update governance/tasks/pending/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT.md to state pending Curator routing to Claude, not direct Claude audit. 5) If AGENT_CONTEXT.md has a current work or notes section, add a short note that BEM-859 direct Claude route was corrected to Curator-only route. Do not write to issue #31. Do not use secrets. No issue comments.
